# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

# Elasticsearch Snapshot Configuration

# S3 Repository Configuration
s3_repository:
  name: "s3_backup_repository"
  type: "s3"
  settings:
    bucket: "elasticsearch-backups"
    region: "us-east-1"
    base_path: "snapshots/production"
    compress: true
    chunk_size: "100mb"
    server_side_encryption: true
    storage_class: "standard_ia"
    max_retries: 3
    use_throttle_retries: true
    readonly: false
    client: "default"

# File Share Repository Configuration
fs_repository:
  name: "fs_backup_repository"
  type: "fs"
  settings:
    location: "/mnt/elasticsearch_backups"
    compress: true
    chunk_size: "100mb"
    max_restore_bytes_per_sec: "40mb"
    max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: "40mb"
    readonly: false

# Azure Repository Configuration
azure_repository:
  name: "azure_backup_repository"
  type: "azure"
  settings:
    container: "elasticsearch-snapshots"
    base_path: "production"
    compress: true
    chunk_size: "100mb"
    readonly: false

# GCS Repository Configuration
gcs_repository:
  name: "gcs_backup_repository"
  type: "gcs"
  settings:
    bucket: "elasticsearch-backups-gcs"
    base_path: "snapshots/production"
    compress: true
    chunk_size: "100mb"
    readonly: false
    client: "default"

# Snapshot Policies
snapshot_policies:
  - name: "daily_snapshot_policy"
    schedule: "0 2 * * *"
    repository: "s3_backup_repository"
    config:
      indices: ["*"]
      ignore_unavailable: true
      include_global_state: true
      partial: false
      metadata:
        taken_by: "automated_policy"
        taken_because: "daily_backup"
    retention:
      expire_after: "30d"
      min_count: 5
      max_count: 50

  - name: "hourly_snapshot_policy"
    schedule: "0 * * * *"
    repository: "s3_backup_repository"
    config:
      indices: ["logs-*", "metrics-*"]
      ignore_unavailable: true
      include_global_state: false
      partial: false
      metadata:
        taken_by: "automated_policy"
        taken_because: "hourly_backup"
    retention:
      expire_after: "7d"
      min_count: 24
      max_count: 168

  - name: "weekly_snapshot_policy"
    schedule: "0 3 * * 0"
    repository: "s3_backup_repository"
    config:
      indices: ["*"]
      ignore_unavailable: true
      include_global_state: true
      partial: false
      metadata:
        taken_by: "automated_policy"
        taken_because: "weekly_backup"
    retention:
      expire_after: "90d"
      min_count: 4
      max_count: 12

  - name: "monthly_snapshot_policy"
    schedule: "0 4 1 * *"
    repository: "s3_backup_repository"
    config:
      indices: ["*"]
      ignore_unavailable: true
      include_global_state: true
      partial: false
      metadata:
        taken_by: "automated_policy"
        taken_because: "monthly_backup"
    retention:
      expire_after: "365d"
      min_count: 12
      max_count: 24

# Manual Snapshot Configuration
manual_snapshots:
  - name: "snapshot_all_indices"
    repository: "s3_backup_repository"
    indices: ["*"]
    ignore_unavailable: true
    include_global_state: true
    partial: false
    wait_for_completion: false
    metadata:
      description: "Complete backup of all indices"
      environment: "production"

  - name: "snapshot_critical_indices"
    repository: "s3_backup_repository"
    indices: 
      - "users-*"
      - "transactions-*"
      - "orders-*"
    ignore_unavailable: false
    include_global_state: false
    partial: false
    wait_for_completion: true
    metadata:
      description: "Backup of critical business indices"
      environment: "production"

  - name: "snapshot_logs"
    repository: "fs_backup_repository"
    indices: ["logs-*"]
    ignore_unavailable: true
    include_global_state: false
    partial: true
    wait_for_completion: false
    metadata:
      description: "Backup of log indices"
      environment: "production"

# Restore Configuration
restore_operations:
  - name: "restore_all_from_snapshot"
    snapshot: "snapshot_all_indices"
    repository: "s3_backup_repository"
    indices: ["*"]
    ignore_unavailable: true
    include_global_state: true
    include_aliases: true
    partial: false
    wait_for_completion: true
    index_settings:
      index.number_of_replicas: 1
    ignore_index_settings:
      - "index.refresh_interval"

  - name: "restore_specific_indices"
    snapshot: "snapshot_critical_indices"
    repository: "s3_backup_repository"
    indices: 
      - "users-2024.01.01"
      - "transactions-2024.01.01"
    rename_pattern: "(.+)"
    rename_replacement: "restored_$1"
    ignore_unavailable: false
    include_global_state: false
    include_aliases: false
    partial: false
    wait_for_completion: true

  - name: "restore_with_rename"
    snapshot: "daily_snapshot"
    repository: "s3_backup_repository"
    indices: ["production-*"]
    rename_pattern: "production-(.+)"
    rename_replacement: "test-$1"
    ignore_unavailable: true
    include_global_state: false
    include_aliases: true
    partial: false
    wait_for_completion: false

  - name: "restore_to_different_cluster"
    snapshot: "snapshot_all_indices"
    repository: "s3_backup_repository"
    indices: ["*"]
    ignore_unavailable: true
    include_global_state: false
    include_aliases: true
    partial: false
    wait_for_completion: true
    index_settings:
      index.number_of_replicas: 2
      index.number_of_shards: 3

# Repository Verification
repository_verification:
  enabled: true
  verify_on_create: true
  verify_schedule: "0 6 * * *"
  repositories:
    - "s3_backup_repository"
    - "fs_backup_repository"

# Snapshot Monitoring
monitoring:
  enabled: true
  check_interval: "5m"
  alerts:
    - name: "snapshot_failure"
      condition: "status == FAILED"
      severity: "critical"
      notification_channels:
        - "email"
        - "slack"
        - "pagerduty"
    
    - name: "snapshot_partial"
      condition: "status == PARTIAL"
      severity: "warning"
      notification_channels:
        - "email"
        - "slack"
    
    - name: "snapshot_duration"
      condition: "duration > 3600"
      severity: "warning"
      notification_channels:
        - "email"
    
    - name: "repository_unavailable"
      condition: "repository_status == UNAVAILABLE"
      severity: "critical"
      notification_channels:
        - "email"
        - "slack"
        - "pagerduty"

# Cleanup Configuration
cleanup:
  enabled: true
  retention_days: 30
  min_snapshots_to_keep: 5
  delete_expired_snapshots: true
  cleanup_schedule: "0 5 * * *"
  repositories:
    - name: "s3_backup_repository"
      retention_days: 30
      min_snapshots: 5
    - name: "fs_backup_repository"
      retention_days: 7
      min_snapshots: 3

# Index Snapshot Settings
index_settings:
  default_settings:
    number_of_replicas: 0
    refresh_interval: "-1"
    translog.durability: "async"
  
  restore_settings:
    number_of_replicas: 1
    refresh_interval: "1s"
    translog.durability: "request"

# Performance Tuning
performance:
  snapshot:
    max_bytes_per_sec: "100mb"
    compress: true
    chunk_size: "100mb"
  restore:
    max_bytes_per_sec: "100mb"
  concurrent_streams: 5

# Security Configuration
security:
  s3_credentials:
    access_key_id: "${AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID}"
    secret_access_key: "${AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY}"
    session_token: "${AWS_SESSION_TOKEN}"
  
  azure_credentials:
    account: "${AZURE_STORAGE_ACCOUNT}"
    key: "${AZURE_STORAGE_KEY}"
  
  gcs_credentials:
    service_account: "${GCS_SERVICE_ACCOUNT}"
  
  encryption:
    enabled: true
    type: "server_side"
    kms_key_id: "${KMS_KEY_ID}"

# Notification Configuration
notifications:
  email:
    enabled: true
    smtp_host: "smtp.company.com"
    smtp_port: 587
    from: "elasticsearch-backups@company.com"
    to:
      - "ops-team@company.com"
      - "dba-team@company.com"
  
  slack:
    enabled: true
    webhook_url: "${SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL}"
    channel: "#elasticsearch-alerts"
  
  pagerduty:
    enabled: true
    integration_key: "${PAGERDUTY_INTEGRATION_KEY}"

# Logging Configuration
logging:
  level: "INFO"
  log_file: "/var/log/elasticsearch/snapshots.log"
  max_size: "100MB"
  max_backups: 10
  compress: true
  include_snapshot_details: true
  include_restore_details: true

# Health Check
health_check:
  enabled: true
  interval: "10m"
  checks:
    - repository_accessible
    - snapshot_status
    - disk_space
    - network_connectivity
  thresholds:
    disk_space_warning: 20
    disk_space_critical: 10

# Disaster Recovery
disaster_recovery:
  enabled: true
  primary_repository: "s3_backup_repository"
  secondary_repository: "azure_backup_repository"
  replication_enabled: true
  cross_region_backup: true
  geo_redundancy: true

# Metadata
metadata:
  version: "1.0.0"
  last_updated: "2024-01-01"
  owner: "Operations Team"
  contact: "ops-team@company.com"
  documentation: "https://wiki.company.com/elasticsearch-backups"
